title: AbstractProblemRegistry v1
description: Caller-provided registry mapping abstract problem types to known solution families, prerequisites, and references; supplied to the engine at campaign.init. Used by ProblemReduction/TechniqueTransplant operators and validated at reduction_audit time.

abstract_problem_type.description: Canonical type ID (e.g., optimization, inference, graph, pde, geometry, algebra, control, signal_processing, numerics).

prerequisite_checklist.description: Conditions that must hold for the abstract problem type to be applicable (e.g., convexity, finite dimensionality).
